name: N8NStarter

compose.name: n8n
compose.description: n8n workflow automation platform. Web UI on port 35678. Connects to the HA PostgreSQL cluster through its primary-routing proxy at host=pgcluster port=5433 db=n8n (always reaches the current primary, even after a failover).

userEnvironmentParameters.name: DB_POSTGRESDB_PASSWORD
userEnvironmentParameters.description: Database password n8n uses to connect to PostgreSQL. MUST match the value you enter for POSTGRES_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD on the pgcluster component. Use a strong random password (16+ chars). Do not use the $ character.

compose.name: pgcluster
compose.description: Highly-available PostgreSQL 14 cluster (Patroni + etcd) with streaming replication and automatic failover across all instances. A built-in proxy on port 5433 always routes to the current primary, so n8n connects at host=pgcluster port=5433.

userEnvironmentParameters.name: POSTGRES_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD
userEnvironmentParameters.description: PostgreSQL superuser password. MUST match the value you enter for DB_POSTGRESDB_PASSWORD on the n8n component. Use a strong random password (16+ chars). Do not use the $ character.

userEnvironmentParameters.name: POSTGRES_REPLICATION_PASSWORD
userEnvironmentParameters.description: Password PostgreSQL replicas use for streaming replication between your instances. Use a strong random password (16+ chars). Do not use the $ character.

userEnvironmentParameters.name: SSL_PASSPHRASE
userEnvironmentParameters.description: Passphrase used to generate the SSL certificates that encrypt replication traffic between your instances. Use a strong random passphrase (16+ chars).

description: Self-hosted n8n workflow automation on a high-availability PostgreSQL cluster (auto-failover, 3 nodes) — n8n 1GB + HA PostgreSQL 1GB · 2 CPU · 15GB SSD. Build AI agents and connect 500+ apps. Web UI on port 35678.

description: Self-hosted n8n workflow automation on a high-availability PostgreSQL cluster (auto-failover, 3 nodes) — n8n 4GB + HA PostgreSQL 2GB · 4 CPU · 35GB SSD. Build AI agents and connect 500+ apps. Web UI on port 35678.
